baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks love land as collateral. Highest base LTV in the game. Value moves slowly — land appreciates on a decade timescale, not a year.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Land feeding an active development pipeline appreciates faster.

flavourText: They're not making any more of it.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Commercial property is the lender's favourite asset class. Strong loan capacity, reliable income, and minimal volatility make this the safest income-generating card in the game.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Owned land supply reduces construction cost uncertainty — lenders expand credit accordingly.
If you also own a REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Mixed-use portfolio management allows income to be reclassified between asset classes.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Leveraged property fund structure unlocked — institutional lending terms apply.

flavourText: Cash flow is for people who haven't discovered equity.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Residential property: the most trusted collateral class. Banks lend generously, tenants pay consistently, and values rarely move sharply. The ideal first asset.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Commercial activity in the portfolio drives residential demand in the same market.

flavourText: The tenant pays the mortgage. You keep the asset.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Large-scale land development introduces planning and execution risk. Slightly wider swings than Tier 1 upstream, but loan capacity remains the highest in the industry at this tier.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, add +2 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. A confirmed development pipeline converts land options into appraised value.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Industrial land adjacent to raw material supply commands a significant lender premium.

flavourText: Rezoning is just another word for arbitrage.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Institutional-grade commercial property: the best combination of loan capacity and income in the game. Volatility is low — but income pressure means active loan offset management is required every year.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Vertically integrated land supply removes the largest single risk factor in commercial development lending.

If you also own a REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM asset, once per game you may refinance all loan tokens across all your owned assets at no repayment cost. Move, consolidate, or remove loans freely during this action. Full vertical stack unlocks portfolio-wide debt restructuring.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Institutional debt financing unlocked — your commercial assets are now a preferred collateral class.

flavourText: The building is the balance sheet.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: A REIT structure pools residential assets for institutional leverage. Rarely loses value — the floor is the most stable in the T2 set. Income is high and consistent, making tax offset the defining strategic challenge.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Commercial assets in the same portfolio allow income reclassification — a standard REIT tax management structure.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of 1). Capital markets access converts your REIT into a rated instrument — lenders reduce covenant pressure.

flavourText: Twelve thousand tenants. One balance sheet. Zero sympathy.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Trophy real estate: more volatile than standard commercial property but still anchored by physical collateral. Income remains positive — unlike tech or energy T3, bricks always generate rent. Loan capacity is the highest absolute base in the game.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's value update roll can never produce a delta lower than -1. Owned land supply provides a hard floor — even trophy assets hold value when the pipeline is controlled.
If you also own a REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. A full residential-to-trophy stack is the most bankable portfolio configuration available to any player.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Institutional debt structures allow trophy asset income to be reclassified as return of capital.

flavourText: Floor 42 has a waiting list. So does the debt facility.
